preconditions.name: documentStatus
preconditions.description: Order must be in Draft (DR) or In Progress (IP) status

steps.name: validateMandatoryFields
steps.description: Verify all mandatory header fields are filled: businessPartner, warehouse, orderDate, priceList

behavioral.errorMessage: Mandatory header fields must be completed before confirming the order

steps.name: validateOrderLines
steps.description: Verify at least one order line exists with product and quantity greater than zero

behavioral.errorMessage: Order must have at least one line with a valid product and quantity

steps.name: reserveStock
steps.description: Create stock reservations for each order line product in the specified warehouse

steps.name: setDocumentStatus
steps.description: Update order document status from Draft to Completed (CO)

steps.name: updateDocAction
steps.description: Reset document action to the default post-completion action (--)

steps.name: generateAccountingFacts
steps.description: Post accounting entries for the completed sales order if accounting is enabled

edgeCases.name: orderAlreadyCompleted
edgeCases.description: Attempting to complete an already-completed order (docStatus=CO) must abort with a clear message
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Process aborts at precondition check with message: Order is already completed

edgeCases.name: missingMandatoryFields
edgeCases.description: Completing an order without a price list or warehouse must fail validation
edgeCases.precondition: priceList IS NULL OR warehouse IS NULL
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Step 1 validation fails; order remains in Draft status

edgeCases.name: noOrderLines
edgeCases.description: Completing an order with zero order lines must be rejected
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Step 2 validation fails with: Order must have at least one line

edgeCases.name: insufficientStock
edgeCases.description: Stock reservation fails when product quantity exceeds warehouse availability
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Step 3 fails; reservation not created; order remains unchanged due to rollback

preconditions.name: documentStatus
preconditions.description: Order must be in Completed (CO) status to be voided

steps.name: validateNotShipped
steps.description: Verify no shipment has been generated from this order that cannot be reversed

behavioral.errorMessage: Cannot void an order that has been shipped

steps.name: releaseStockReservations
steps.description: Release all stock reservations associated with order lines

steps.name: setDocumentStatusVoided
steps.description: Update order document status to Voided (VO)

steps.name: reverseAccountingFacts
steps.description: Generate reversal accounting entries to cancel the original posting

edgeCases.name: orderNotCompleted
edgeCases.description: Voiding a Draft order must be rejected at the precondition check
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Process aborts with: Order must be completed before it can be voided

edgeCases.name: orderWithShipment
edgeCases.description: Voiding an order that has a posted shipment must be blocked
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Step 1 validation fails; order remains in Completed status

edgeCases.name: alreadyVoided
edgeCases.description: Attempting to void an already-voided order must be rejected at precondition
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Process aborts at precondition check with: Order is already voided
